# PostPilot

> PostPilot is a local-first autoposting workspace that turns a user description, data, and captured media into formatted posting packages for selected social platforms.

## What It Does

- Generates platform-ready posting packages from one description.
- Uses optional notes, links, repositories, screenshots, screen recordings, and research.
- Produces post copy, visual media plans, generated cards, prompts, Markdown exports, and JSON summaries.
- Supports LinkedIn, X, Instagram, blogs, newsletters, and release notes.
- Keeps final publishing reviewable and platform-safe.

## Good Search Summary

PostPilot helps creators, founders, developers, and small teams describe once and generate social posts, captions, screenshots/GIF planning, media cards, and export files for selected social channels.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/Ankit6149/SignalFlow
